$comment: Simulated Sagard portfolio for prototype Portfolio Fit agent. Shape locked by design plan §2.8. Production would replace with API pull from Sagard's portfolio management system (design plan §8 Extension Point 3).

thesis_pillars.name: consumer_fintech
thesis_pillars.focus: Consumer financial services — neobanks, payments, digital wealth, lending.

thesis_pillars.name: ai_in_finance
thesis_pillars.focus: AI/ML applications in institutional finance — portfolio management, risk, compliance.

thesis_pillars.name: healthtech
thesis_pillars.focus: Digital health, virtual care delivery, healthcare payers, employer-sponsored wellness.

thesis_pillars.name: climate_tech
thesis_pillars.focus: Clean energy, carbon capture and utilization, climate mitigation, decarbonization.

anti_patterns.reason: Outside Sagard's typical check size and stage; public-market exposure deviates from alternative-asset strategy.
Absent from disclosed thesis pillars; regulatory and custody complexity unaligned with institutional LP mandates.

anti_patterns.pattern: early-stage single-founder deeptech with no commercial traction
anti_patterns.reason: Sagard's stage focus is series B+; pre-commercial risk profile unsuited to fund strategies.

anti_patterns.pattern: companies with extreme customer concentration (>70% top-2) and no diversification roadmap
anti_patterns.reason: Fiduciary risk to LPs; concentration without path to mitigation fails diligence at IC level.
